code:
from typing import List

MOD = 10**9 + 7

class SegmentTreeNode:
    def __init__(self, left, right):
        self.left = left
        self.right = right
        self.left_child = None
        self.right_child = None
        self.max_sum = 0
        self.include = 0
        self.exclude = 0

class Solution:
    def maximumSumSubsequence(self, nums: List[int], queries: List[List[int]]) -> int:
        n = len(nums)
        self.root = self.build_tree(nums, 0, n - 1)
        result = 0

        for pos, x in queries:
            nums[pos] = x
            self.update(self.root, pos, x)
            result = (result + self.root.max_sum) % MOD

        return result

    def build_tree(self, nums, left, right):
        node = SegmentTreeNode(left, right)
        if left == right:
            node.include = nums[left]
            node.exclude = 0
            node.max_sum = max(node.include, node.exclude)
            return node
        mid = (left + right) // 2
        node.left_child = self.build_tree(nums, left, mid)
        node.right_child = self.build_tree(nums, mid + 1, right)
        self.push_up(node)
        return node

    def update(self, node, index, value):
        if node.left == node.right == index:
            node.include = value
            node.exclude = 0
            node.max_sum = max(node.include, node.exclude)
            return
        if index <= node.left_child.right:
            self.update(node.left_child, index, value)
        else:
            self.update(node.right_child, index, value)
        self.push_up(node)

    def push_up(self, node):
        left = node.left_child
        right = node.right_child
        node.include = max(left.include, left.exclude) + max(right.include, right.exclude)
        node.exclude = max(left.include, left.exclude) + max(right.include, right.exclude)
        node.max_sum = max(node.include, node.exclude)
